# Copilot Instructions

All project rules are defined in [`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) at the repository root.
**Read that file before making any changes.** The rules there are authoritative and apply to all contributors and agents.

Key areas covered:
- Sequential numbering for all files under `docs/`
- ADR authoring rules (numbering, performance data, superseding)
- Diagram format (Mermaid only)
- Document heading format (title + status table)
- Code review file conventions
